# gandi_domain (Data Source)

Look up an existing Gandi domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gandi_domain" "example" {
  fqdn = "example.com"
}

output "current_nameservers" {
  value = data.gandi_domain.example.nameservers
}

output "expires_at" {
  value = data.gandi_domain.example.registry_ends_at
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fqdn` (String) Fully qualified domain name to look up.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `nameservers` (List of String)
- `registry_ends_at` (String) Expiry date at the registry.
- `status` (List of String)
- `tld` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
